docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMPSON, JULIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NIELSEN, VIRGINIA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,590.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00 AWARDED DUE TO THE DEFENDANTS BAD FAITH FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (C) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-02-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-02-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF JULIE THOMPSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VIRGINIA NEILSEN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY THOMPSON, JULIE AS TO DEFENDANT NIELSEN, VIRGINIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-02-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED DEC-21-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NIELSEN, VIRGINIA
